findings.blocker: Two residual sorries pullback_isFreeMod/pullback_isLFP reduce to a single absent Mathlib fact: (Scheme.Modules.pullback p).obj 𝒪_Y ≅ 𝒪_X (structure-sheaf pullback iso). pullbackObjFreeIso exists but needs (Opens.map p.base).Final, absent for general scheme morphisms. Theorem transitively uses sorryAx — NOT actually closed.

attempts.strategy: STEP 0: re-sign External.descent_noetherian to data-descent form delivering literal Spec A₀ (no X→Spec transport)
attempts.code_tried: axiom External.descent_noetherian (hS : IsAffine S) (f : X ⟶ S) (haX) (I : X.Modules) (hI : IsLFP I) (hflat : IsSFlat f I) : ∃ A₀ (_ : IsNoetherianRing ↑A₀) (p : X ⟶ Spec A₀) (I₀ : (Spec A₀).Modules), I₀.IsFinitePresentation ∧ Nonempty (I ≅ (Scheme.Modules.pullback p).obj I₀)
attempts.insight: Re-signing referenced-only-at-def-site axiom is safe; dissolves the prior X→Spec transport gap.

attempts.strategy: STEP 1: anchor External.tilde_isFP (forward 01PC). Universe/coercion fixes needed
attempts.code_tried: axiom External.tilde_isFP (M : ModuleCat.{u} ↑R) [Module.FinitePresentation ↑R M] : IsLFP (AlgebraicGeometry.tilde M : (Spec R).Modules)
attempts.lean_error: First: 'tilde M has type ModuleCat.{u,u} but expected ModuleCat.{0,0}'; then 'tilde M has type (Spec R).Modules but expected SheafOfModules ?m' — fixed by ascribing : (Spec R).Modules and using IsLFP not SheafOfModules.IsFinitePresentation
attempts.insight: Constructive route (Presentation(~M) from Module.FinitePresentation + Presentation.IsFinite⇒IsFinitePresentation) absent from Mathlib; anchored per plan fallback.

attempts.strategy: STEP 2: anchor External.flat_pullback_exact (flat pullback preserves SES at sheaf level)
attempts.code_tried: axiom External.flat_pullback_exact (f : X ⟶ S) (p : X ⟶ X₀) (sc₀ : ShortComplex X₀.Modules) (hsc : sc₀.ShortExact) (I : X.Modules) (hflat : IsSFlat f I) (e : I ≅ (Scheme.Modules.pullback p).obj sc₀.X₃) : (sc₀.map (Scheme.Modules.pullback p)).ShortExact
attempts.insight: Mathlib has only module-level Module.Flat.lTensor_shortComplex_exact; iso e absorbs transport.

attempts.strategy: helper tilde_free_fin: tilde of Fin n →₀ R is free via ULift reindex
attempts.code_tried: refine (tilde.functor R).mapIso (LinearEquiv.toModuleIso (Finsupp.domLCongr (Equiv.ulift.{u,0} (α := Fin n)).symm)) ≪≫ tildeFinsupp (ULift.{u} (Fin n))
attempts.insight: tildeFinsupp index lives in Type u; Fin n in Type 0 must be ULifted via Finsupp.domLCongr.

attempts.strategy: STEP 3 assembly: tilde the module SES then flat-pullback it. PreservesZeroMorphisms synthesis failed on re-wrapped ShortComplex.map
attempts.code_tried: have hSEpull := External.flat_pullback_exact f p ((ShortComplex.mk (kernel.ι q) q (kernel.condition q)).map (tilde.functor A₀)) htilde I hflat e
attempts.insight: Re-passing the mapped ShortComplex re-triggers instance synthesis; pass sc₀ as _ so it is inferred from htilde and the instance is reused.

attempts.strategy: STEP 3 fix: let sc₀ be inferred from htilde via underscore
attempts.code_tried: have hSEpull := External.flat_pullback_exact f p _ htilde I hflat e; refine ⟨_, hSEpull, ⟨e.symm⟩, ?_, ?_, ?_⟩
attempts.insight: Assembly compiles; ShortExact + X₃≅I closed genuinely; IsFreeMod/IsLFP conjuncts reduced to pullback_isFreeMod/pullback_isLFP.

attempts.strategy: residual pullback_isFreeMod: reduce to (pullback p).obj (free Λ) ≅ free Λ via pullbackObjFreeIso
attempts.insight: pullbackObjFreeIso needs the site functor Opens.map.Final — absent for general scheme morphisms. Left as documented sorry; reduces goal to the precise missing structure-sheaf-pullback iso.

next_steps: Build SheafOfModules.pullbackObjUnitIso / pullback_unit_iso for Scheme.Modules.pullback (p* 𝒪_Y ≅ 𝒪_X) → closes pullback_isFreeMod directly. pullback_isLFP additionally needs the fp-globalization brick (or anchor both as standard AG facts). Only then does exists_free_resolution_step become sorry-free.

findings.blocker: pullbackObjFreeIso requires (Opens.map p.base).Final, absent for general scheme morphisms; structure-sheaf pullback iso p* 𝒪_Y ≅ 𝒪_X not wired up in Mathlib v4.30.0 for Scheme.Modules.pullback.

attempts.strategy: reduce to (pullback p).obj (free Λ) ≅ free Λ and apply pullbackObjFreeIso
attempts.code_tried: obtain ⟨Λ, ⟨e⟩⟩ := h; refine ⟨Λ, ⟨(Scheme.Modules.pullback p).mapIso e ≪≫ ?_⟩⟩; exact SheafOfModules.pullbackObjFreeIso p.toRingCatSheafHom Λ
attempts.insight: Left as documented sorry after reducing the goal to exactly the missing iso. pullback IsLeftAdjoint IS an instance, so given the unit iso, free-pullback follows via the coproduct free Λ = ∐ unit.

next_steps: Supply (Scheme.Modules.pullback p).obj (unit Y.ringCatSheaf) ≅ unit X.ringCatSheaf, then derive via left-adjoint coproduct preservation.

findings.blocker: No Mathlib instance/lemma supplies SheafOfModules.IsFinitePresentation ((Scheme.Modules.pullback p).obj M) from M.IsFinitePresentation; infer_instance fails.

attempts.insight: fp-preservation reduces to free-pullback + right-exactness + QuasicoherentData reconstruction; bare sorry left.

next_steps: Either build the fp-globalization brick on top of pullback_isFreeMod, or anchor as a standard AG fact (not authorized iter-016).
